chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 561 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.5976/2025 (C/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.2493/2021 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Ghulam Murtaza, Assistant Commissioner, Rohri >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received; same was the position on the last two dates of hearing. Perusal of the record reflects that the Petitioners after obtaining interim order have chosen to remain absent; resultantly on the last date of hearing i.e. 23-09-2025 the interim order was recalled. Today, one again, nobody has turned up to proceed with this matter, which is pending since 2021 without any useful progress. The deliberate absence on the part of the Petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
